infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow the microphone for optional hands-free commands (e.g. describe environment).
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow speech recognition to detect hands-free commands on the navigation screen.

plugins.cameraPermission: This app uses the camera to detect obstacles in real time.
plugins.microphonePermission: This app uses the microphone for voice commands.

plugins.motionPermission: Motion is used to detect a shake so we can repeat the close-obstacle warning.

plugins.microphonePermission: Microphone access lets the app detect the phrase describe environment.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Speech recognition enables hands-free scene description commands.
